steps.title: Spot the logical chain
steps.content: The underlined statement establishes a trait in modern animals that prompts a hypothesis about mammoths; the passage then reveals data that contradicts this hypothesis.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A correctly identifies the function: the observation about modern animals explains the hypothesis about mammoths, which the data failed to support. The other three misread the passage—B invents pattern exceptions, C falsely claims the method didn't work, and D focuses on trait origins instead of behavioral similarity.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
